overall.description: Cinematic first-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a rainy night walk through a historic city resembling New Orleans. The player passes a stationary tram, a horse-drawn wagon, and various illuminated shops before entering a gated courtyard with a central mansion.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with tram tracks

events.description: passing a stationary tram on the right side of the street
slight leftward turn to follow the street curve

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet cobblestone street past a stationary tram and various storefronts

notable_agents.action: stationary tram on tracks, being passed by the camera

entered.detail: row of two-story historic buildings with lit windows and ground-floor storefronts
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street surface
ornate gas street lamps casting warm yellow light through the fog
wooden construction barriers and barrels along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a historic city street. The camera walks forward along wet cobblestones, passing a stationary tram on the right. Warm gas lamps illuminate the foggy atmosphere, revealing a row of commercial buildings on the left with various storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with smithy and asian restaurant

events.description: passing a horse-drawn wagon parked on the left sidewalk
approaching the bright red neon glow of the Jade Dragon Restaurant sign

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, passing a wagon and approaching an illuminated restaurant sign

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn delivery wagon with driver seated on the bench

entered.detail: large red neon sign with chinese characters hanging across the street
white painted sign for blacksmith and ship chandler services
red paper lanterns hanging from building awnings

segments.scene_description: The camera passes a horse-drawn wagon on the left and approaches the Jade Dragon Restaurant, marked by a prominent red neon sign. The street features mixed architecture including a blacksmith shop, and red paper lanterns begin to appear, signaling a transition to a different cultural district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with asian-inspired decor

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath building awnings
passing under intense red lantern light casting red hues on the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered sidewalk, passing close to red lanterns and shop windows

entered.detail: wooden overhang and balcony structure covering the sidewalk
green painted wooden facade with large multi-pane windows
vertical red signs with gold chinese characters

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow, covered walkway sheltered from the rain by wooden awnings. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, casting a warm red glow on the green wooden building facades. The atmosphere is intimate and enclosed compared to the open street.

events.description: exiting covered walkway back to open street
slight rightward turn toward the courtyard entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the open street, passing various storefronts and approaching a gated courtyard

entered.detail: wrought iron gates leading to a garden courtyard with a large tree visible inside
wooden benches along the sidewalk near the courtyard entrance
large willow tree visible through the gate inside the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the camera returns to the open cobblestone street. The view opens toward a gated courtyard with a prominent tree and benches. The architecture shifts from commercial to residential as the camera approaches the iron gates.

events.description: entering the courtyard through the wrought iron gate
slowing down while approaching the mansion entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard gate and approaching the central mansion building

entered.detail: enclosed garden area with paved paths, bushes, and landscaping
large historic building with multiple lit windows at the courtyard center
decorative iron fencing along the courtyard perimeter

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a serene courtyard garden through the iron gate, leaving the street behind. A large tree dominates the center, surrounded by benches and bushes. The camera approaches a stately mansion building with warm lights glowing in the windows, creating a peaceful conclusion to the rainy night journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy historic city that transforms from a bustling commercial street into a serene, private estate. It begins by moving along wet cobblestones past a stationary tram and warm gas lamps, before passing a horse-drawn wagon and the red neon sign of the Jade Dragon Restaurant. As the camera enters a narrow covered walkway, the open street gives way to an intimate space defined by wooden awnings and the warm red glow of overhead paper lanterns. The scene then opens back onto the cobblestones, shifting from commercial storefronts toward residential architecture as the camera approaches a set of iron gates. Finally, the camera passes through the gates into a quiet courtyard garden, moving past a large central tree toward a stately mansion with glowing windows.
